case_title: AFFILIATED PRODUCERS INC. VS ACCESS ADVERTISING INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $400.00 FILED BY AFFILIATED PRODUCERS INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ACCESS ADVERTISING INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-05-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO ACCESS ADVERTISING INC. RETURNED SIGNED.
CERT. RECEIPT TO COLTON PIANO & ORGAN RETURNED SIGNED.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $3,900.00 FILED BY ACCESS ADVERTISING INC. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT AFFILIATED PRODUCERS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-14-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
INVALID SERVICE AS TO DEFEND, NO DESCRIPTION OF TITLE OF PARTY SERVED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-05-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-14-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AFFILIATED PRODUCERS INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ACCESS ADVERTISING INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT AFFILIATED PRODUCERS INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
